## 3. Astro Page Files

### src/pages/index.astro
````astro
---
import { Image } from 'astro:assets';
import { getCollection, getEntry } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

const home = await getEntry('settings', 'home');
const posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) => !data.draft);
const selectedSlugs = home?.data.featuredPosts ?? [];
const selectedPosts = selectedSlugs
  .map((slug) => posts.find((post) => post.slug === slug || post.data.slug === slug))
  .filter(Boolean);
const fallbackFeatured = posts
  .filter((post) => post.data.featured)
  .sort((a, b) => a.data.featuredOrder - b.data.featuredOrder || b.data.publishDate.valueOf() - a.data.publishDate.valueOf());
const featuredPosts = (selectedPosts.length ? selectedPosts : fallbackFeatured).slice(0, 3);
const { Content: HomeIntro } = await home!.render();
---

<BaseLayout>
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="container hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-copy">
        <h1>{home?.data.heroHeadline}</h1>
        <p>{home?.data.heroSubheading}</p>
        <a class="button" href={home?.data.ctaLink}>{home?.data.ctaText}</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-header">
        <h2>Featured Reads</h2>
        <p>Hand-picked guides for making money feel clearer, one practical step at a time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-grid">
        {featuredPosts.map((post) => (
          <article class="post-card">
            <a href={`/blog/${post.slug}`} aria-label={`Read ${post.data.title}`}>
              <Image src={post.data.featuredImage} alt={post.data.featuredImageAlt} widths={[360, 520, 720]} sizes="(min-width: 720px) 33vw, 100vw" />
            </a>
            <div class="post-card-content">
              <h3><a href={`/blog/${post.slug}`}>{post.data.title}</a></h3>
              <p>{post.data.description}</p>
              <a class="read-more" href={`/blog/${post.slug}`}>Read more</a>
            </div>
          </article>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="intro-strip">
    <div class="container intro-inner">
      <div class="prose">
        <HomeIntro />
      </div>
      <a href="/about">About Hello Money Clarity</a>
    </div>
  </section>
</BaseLayout>

<style>
  .hero {
    background: var(--color-teal);
    color: var(--color-white);
  }

  .hero-inner {
    min-height: clamp(440px, 74vh, 720px);
    display: grid;
    align-items: center;
    padding-block: 4rem;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1.1rem;
    max-width: 780px;
  }

  .hero h1,
  .hero p {
    color: var(--color-white);
  }

  .hero p {
    max-width: 660px;
    margin: 0;
    font-size: clamp(1.12rem, 1rem + 0.6vw, 1.45rem);
  }

  .intro-strip {
    padding-block: 2.2rem;
    background: var(--color-soft);
    border-block: 1px solid var(--color-line);
  }

  .intro-inner {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .intro-inner a {
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  @media (min-width: 820px) {
    .intro-inner {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
      align-items: center;
    }
  }
</style>
````

### src/pages/about.astro

````astro
---
import { getEntry } from 'astro:content';

const about = await getEntry('settings', 'about');

    <div class="container">
      <h1>{about?.data.title}</h1>
    </div>
  </section>

</BaseLayout>

  }

    padding-top: 2rem;

</style>
````

### src/pages/contact.astro
````astro
---
import { getEntry } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

const site = await getEntry('settings', 'site');
const contact = await getEntry('settings', 'contact');
const email = site?.data.contactEmail ?? 'HelloMoneyClarity@gmail.com';
const pinterestUrl = site?.data.pinterestUrl ?? '#';
const { Content } = await contact!.render();
---

<BaseLayout title="Contact" description="Contact Hello Money Clarity by email.">
  <section class="section contact-page">
    <div class="container contact-inner">
      <h1>{contact?.data.title ?? 'Contact'}</h1>
      <div class="prose">
        <Content />
      </div>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a class="button" href={`mailto:${email}`}>{email}</a>
        <a href={pinterestUrl}>Pinterest</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</BaseLayout>

<style>
  .contact-page {
    min-height: 55vh;
    display: grid;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .contact-inner {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
    max-width: 760px;
  }

  .contact-inner :global(p) {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1rem + 0.45vw, 1.3rem);
  }

  .contact-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
</style>
````

### src/pages/blog/index.astro
````astro
---
import { Image } from 'astro:assets';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

const posts = (await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) => !data.draft)).sort(
  (a, b) => b.data.publishDate.valueOf() - a.data.publishDate.valueOf()
);
---

<BaseLayout title="Blog" description="Debt payoff, budgeting, and money clarity guides from Hello Money Clarity.">
  <section class="section blog-index">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-header">
        <h1>Blog</h1>
        <p>Practical guides for debt payoff, budgeting, and clearer day-to-day money decisions.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="post-list">
        {posts.map((post) => (
          <article class="post-card list-card">
            <a href={`/blog/${post.slug}`} aria-label={`Read ${post.data.title}`}>
              <Image src={post.data.featuredImage} alt={post.data.featuredImageAlt} widths={[320, 520, 760]} sizes="(min-width: 760px) 320px, 100vw" />
            </a>
            <div class="post-card-content">
              <div class="post-meta">
                <time datetime={post.data.publishDate.toISOString()}>{post.data.publishDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}</time>
              </div>
              <h2><a href={`/blog/${post.slug}`}>{post.data.title}</a></h2>
              <p>{post.data.description}</p>
              <a class="read-more" href={`/blog/${post.slug}`}>Read more</a>
            </div>
          </article>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</BaseLayout>

<style>
  .blog-index {
    background: var(--color-soft);
  }

  .post-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .list-card h2 {
    font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 1.2rem + 0.7vw, 2rem);
  }

  .list-card h2 a {
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  @media (min-width: 760px) {
    .list-card {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;
    }

    .list-card img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }
  }
</style>
````

### src/pages/blog/[slug].astro
````astro
---
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BlogLayout from '@/layouts/BlogLayout.astro';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
  const posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) => !data.draft);
  return posts.map((post) => ({ params: { slug: post.slug }, props: { post } }));
}

const { post } = Astro.props;
const { Content, remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await post.render();
const wordCount = (remarkPluginFrontmatter?.minutes ? Math.round(remarkPluginFrontmatter.minutes * 200) : post.body.split(/\s+/).length);
const readTime = `${Math.max(1, Math.ceil(wordCount / 200))} min read`;
---

<BlogLayout post={post} Content={Content} readTime={readTime} />
````

## 4. Layout Files And Component Files

### src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro
````astro
---
import Logo from '@/components/Logo.astro';
import { getEntry } from 'astro:content';

interface Props {
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  image?: string;
}

const site = await getEntry('settings', 'site');
const siteTitle = site?.data.title ?? 'Hello Money Clarity';
const siteDescription = site?.data.description ?? 'Simple, honest tools for debt payoff and financial clarity.';
const footerLinks = site?.data.footerLinks ?? [
  { label: 'About', href: '/about' },
  { label: 'Blog', href: '/blog' },
  { label: 'Contact', href: '/contact' }
];
const contactEmail = site?.data.contactEmail ?? 'HelloMoneyClarity@gmail.com';
const pinterestUrl = site?.data.pinterestUrl ?? '#';
const pageTitle = Astro.props.title ? `${Astro.props.title} | ${siteTitle}` : siteTitle;
const description = Astro.props.description ?? siteDescription;
const canonical = new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site ?? Astro.url.origin);
const ogImage = Astro.props.image ? new URL(Astro.props.image, Astro.site ?? Astro.url.origin) : undefined;
---

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <meta name="generator" content={Astro.generator} />
    <title>{pageTitle}</title>
    <meta name="description" content={description} />
    <link rel="canonical" href={canonical} />
    <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml" />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
    <meta property="og:title" content={pageTitle} />
    <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
    <meta property="og:url" content={canonical} />
    {ogImage && <meta property="og:image" content={ogImage} />}
    <meta name="twitter:card" content={ogImage ? 'summary_large_image' : 'summary'} />
  </head>
  <body>
    <a class="skip-link" href="#main">Skip to content</a>
    <header class="site-header">
      <div class="container header-inner">
        <Logo />
        <nav class="primary-nav" aria-label="Main navigation">
          <a href="/about">About</a>
          <a href="/blog">Blog</a>
          <a href="/contact">Contact</a>
        </nav>
      </div>
    </header>
    <main id="main">
      <slot />
    </main>
    <footer class="site-footer">
      <div class="container footer-grid">
        <div class="footer-brand">
          <Logo />
          <p>{site?.data.footerText ?? 'Clear steps for calmer money decisions.'}</p>
        </div>
        <nav class="footer-links" aria-label="Footer navigation">
          {footerLinks.map((link) => <a href={link.href}>{link.label}</a>)}
        </nav>
        <div class="footer-contact">
          <a href={pinterestUrl}>Pinterest</a>
          <a href={`mailto:${contactEmail}`}>{contactEmail}</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="container footer-bottom">
        <p>(c) {new Date().getFullYear()} Hello Money Clarity. All rights reserved.</p>
      </div>
    </footer>
  </body>
</html>

<style is:global>
  :root {
    --color-teal: #0f4c4c;
    --color-gold: #d4a93c;
    --color-white: #ffffff;
    --color-soft: #f7f9f7;
    --color-line: rgba(15, 76, 76, 0.14);
    --color-muted: rgba(15, 76, 76, 0.72);
    --shadow-soft: 0 14px 40px rgba(15, 76, 76, 0.08);
    --radius: 8px;
    color-scheme: light;
  }

  * {
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  html {
    font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
    color: var(--color-teal);
    background: var(--color-white);
    line-height: 1.5;
    text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  }

  body {
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 320px;
  }

  img,
  picture {
    display: block;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration-color: var(--color-gold);
    text-decoration-thickness: 2px;
    text-underline-offset: 0.18em;
  }

  a:hover {
    color: #0b3939;
  }

  p,
  li {
    color: var(--color-muted);
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 0.97rem + 0.16vw, 1.08rem);
  }

  h1,
  h2,
  h3,
  h4 {
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.12;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    color: var(--color-teal);
  }

  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(2.45rem, 1.95rem + 2.2vw, 4.8rem);
  }

  h2 {
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 1.55rem + 1.1vw, 3rem);
  }

  h3 {
    font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 1.15rem + 0.45vw, 1.65rem);
  }

  .container {
    width: min(100% - 32px, 1120px);
    margin-inline: auto;
  }

  .skip-link {
    position: absolute;
    left: 16px;
    top: 12px;
    z-index: 20;
    transform: translateY(-140%);
    background: var(--color-teal);
    color: var(--color-white);
    padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
  }

  .skip-link:focus {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .site-header {
    background: var(--color-white);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line);
  }

  .header-inner {
    min-height: 74px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .logo {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.7rem;
    min-width: 0;
    color: var(--color-teal);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .logo-mark {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
    flex: 0 0 42px;
  }

  .logo-wordmark {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.05rem;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .logo-wordmark span {
    color: var(--color-gold);
  }

  .logo-wordmark strong {
    color: var(--color-teal);
  }

  .primary-nav,
  .footer-links,
  .footer-contact {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .primary-nav a,
  .footer-links a,
  .footer-contact a {
    font-weight: 700;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .button,
  .cta-button,
  .button-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 46px;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.1rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: var(--color-gold);
    color: #123737;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(212, 169, 60, 0.22);
  }

  .button:hover,
  .cta-button:hover,
  .button-link:hover {
    color: #123737;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .section {
    padding-block: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
  }

  .section-header {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .card-grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .post-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--color-line);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-white);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  }

  .post-card-content {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.7rem;
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .post-card h3 a {
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .post-meta {
    color: rgba(15, 76, 76, 0.64);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .read-more {
    color: var(--color-teal);
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .site-footer {
    background: var(--color-teal);
    color: var(--color-white);
    padding-block: 2rem 1rem;
  }

  .site-footer .logo-wordmark strong,
  .site-footer .logo,
  .site-footer a,
  .site-footer p {
    color: var(--color-white);
  }

  .site-footer .logo-wordmark span {
    color: var(--color-gold);
  }

  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1.4rem;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.8rem;
  }

  .footer-brand p,
  .footer-bottom p {
    margin: 0;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);
  }

  .footer-bottom {
    padding-top: 1.5rem;
  }

  .prose {
    width: min(100%, 760px);
  }

  .prose > * + * {
    margin-top: 1.05rem;
  }

  .prose h2,
  .prose h3,
  .prose h4 {
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .prose blockquote {
    margin-inline: 0;
    padding: 1rem;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--color-gold);
    background: var(--color-soft);
    border-radius: 0 var(--radius) var(--radius) 0;
  }

  .prose .cta-button,
  .prose .button-link {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
  }

  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .header-inner {
      align-items: flex-start;
      flex-direction: column;
      padding-block: 0.9rem;
    }

    .primary-nav {
      width: 100%;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .logo-wordmark {
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }
  }

  @media (min-width: 720px) {
    .card-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .footer-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr 1fr;
      align-items: start;
    }
  }
</style>
````

### src/layouts/BlogLayout.astro
````astro
---
import { Image } from 'astro:assets';
import BaseLayout from '@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import CTAButton from '@/components/CTAButton.astro';
import { getEntry } from 'astro:content';

interface Props {
  post: any;
  Content: any;
  readTime: string;
}

const { post, Content, readTime } = Astro.props;
const site = await getEntry('settings', 'site');
const disclaimer = site?.data.affiliateDisclaimer;
const description = post.data.metaDescription ?? post.data.description;
const image = post.data.socialImage?.src ?? post.data.featuredImage.src;
---

<BaseLayout title={post.data.title} description={description} image={image}>
  <article class="post-page">
    <header class="container post-hero">
      <div class="post-kicker">{post.data.author} / {readTime}</div>
      <h1>{post.data.title}</h1>
      <p>{post.data.description}</p>
      <div class="post-meta">
        <time datetime={post.data.publishDate.toISOString()}>{post.data.publishDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}</time>
      </div>
      <Image src={post.data.featuredImage} alt={post.data.featuredImageAlt} widths={[640, 960, 1280]} sizes="(min-width: 960px) 960px, 100vw" loading="eager" />
    </header>
    <div class="container post-body">
      {disclaimer && <aside class="affiliate-note">{disclaimer}</aside>}
      <div class="prose">
        <Content components={{ CTAButton }} />
      </div>
    </div>
  </article>
</BaseLayout>

<style>
  .post-page {
    padding-bottom: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
  }

  .post-hero {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
    padding-block: clamp(2.4rem, 7vw, 5rem) 1.5rem;
  }

  .post-hero p {
    max-width: 720px;
    margin: 0;
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1rem + 0.5vw, 1.35rem);
  }

  .post-kicker {
    color: var(--color-gold);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .post-hero img {
    width: 100%;
    max-height: 560px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-line);
  }

  .post-body {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1.25rem;
  }

  .affiliate-note {
    width: min(100%, 760px);
    padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(212, 169, 60, 0.42);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: #fffaf0;
    color: var(--color-muted);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }
</style>
````

## 5. Content Collection Schemas And Settings Files

### src/content/config.ts
````ts
import { defineCollection, z } from 'astro:content';

const blog = defineCollection({
  type: 'content',
  schema: ({ image }) =>
    z.object({
      title: z.string(),
      slug: z.string().optional(),
      publishDate: z.coerce.date(),
      featuredImage: image(),
      featuredImageAlt: z.string(),
      description: z.string(),
      featured: z.boolean().default(false),
      featuredOrder: z.number().default(999),
      tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
      metaDescription: z.string().optional(),
      socialImage: image().optional(),
      author: z.string().default('Hello Money Clarity'),
      draft: z.boolean().default(false)
    })
});

const settings = defineCollection({
  type: 'content',
  schema: z
    .object({
      title: z.string().optional(),
      description: z.string().optional(),
      contactEmail: z.string().email().optional(),
      pinterestUrl: z.string().optional(),
      affiliateDisclaimer: z.string().optional(),
      footerText: z.string().optional(),
      footerLinks: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), href: z.string() })).optional(),
      heroHeadline: z.string().optional(),
      heroSubheading: z.string().optional(),
      ctaText: z.string().optional(),
      ctaLink: z.string().optional(),
      featuredPosts: z.array(z.string()).optional()
    })
    .passthrough()
});

export const collections = { blog, settings };
````

### src/content/settings/about.md
````md
---
title: Hello, we're glad you're here.
---
Hello Money Clarity started with a simple frustration: most financial advice online is either too vague to act on, or too aggressive about selling you something you don't need.

We wanted something different - content that treats you like a capable adult who's dealing with a real, stressful problem, and tools that actually help you solve it.

Whether you're staring down credit card debt, trying to build a budget that survives contact with real life, or just want a clearer picture of where your money goes, you're in the right place.

What you'll find here:

* Straightforward guides on debt payoff strategies (debt snowball, debt avalanche, and everything in between)
* Budgeting approaches for real, messy, non-linear incomes
* Templates and trackers designed to make progress visible, because seeing progress is what keeps you going

A quick note on honesty: Some posts include links to tools or products we've created or recommend. If you purchase through them, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. We only recommend what we'd use ourselves.

Thanks for being here. Let's get you some clarity.
````

````md
featuredPosts:

---

Hello Money Clarity is built for anyone who's tired of financial advice that talks down to them or oversells a "hack." We break down debt payoff and money management into steps that actually make sense - plus tools you can use today, not someday.
````

## 6. Decap CMS Config And Admin HTML

### public/admin/config.yml
````yaml
local_backend:
  url: http://localhost:8081/api/v1

backend:
  name: git-gateway
  repo: gaidilamine/hello-money-clarity
  branch: main
  base_url: https://auth.decapbridge.com
  auth_endpoint: /sites/5040a8d3-a6ca-4aed-927c-41c551e441dc/pkce

site_url: https://hello-money-clarity.pages.dev
display_url: https://hello-money-clarity.pages.dev
logo_url: /favicon.svg

media_folder: src/assets/blog
public_folder: ../../assets/blog

publish_mode: editorial_workflow

editor:
  preview: true

collections:
  - name: blog
    label: Blog Posts
    label_singular: Blog Post
    folder: src/content/blog
    create: true
    extension: mdx
    format: frontmatter
    slug: "{{slug}}"
    preview_path: blog/{{slug}}
    summary: "{{title}} - {{publishDate}}"
    fields:
      - { label: Title, name: title, widget: string }
      - { label: Slug, name: slug, widget: string, hint: "Lowercase words separated by hyphens." }
      - { label: Publish Date, name: publishDate, widget: datetime, date_format: "YYYY-MM-DD", time_format: false }
      - { label: Featured Image, name: featuredImage, widget: image }
      - { label: Featured Image Alt Text, name: featuredImageAlt, widget: string }
      - { label: Short Excerpt, name: description, widget: text, hint: "Shown on cards and used as the default SEO description." }
      - { label: Featured on Homepage, name: featured, widget: boolean, default: false }
      - { label: Homepage Order, name: featuredOrder, widget: number, default: 999, value_type: int, min: 1, hint: "Lower numbers appear first when the post is featured." }
      - { label: Categories/Tags, name: tags, widget: list, required: false, field: { label: Tag, name: tag, widget: string } }
      - { label: SEO Meta Description, name: metaDescription, widget: text, required: false }
      - { label: Social Share Image, name: socialImage, widget: image, required: false }
      - label: Body
        name: body
        widget: markdown
        buttons: [bold, italic, heading-one, heading-two, heading-three, heading-four, quote, bulleted-list, numbered-list, link]
        editor_components: [image, cta-button]

  - name: settings
    label: Site Settings
    files:
      - name: home
        label: Homepage
        file: src/content/settings/home.md
        fields:
          - { label: Hero Headline, name: heroHeadline, widget: string }
          - { label: Hero Subheading, name: heroSubheading, widget: text }
          - { label: CTA Text, name: ctaText, widget: string }
          - { label: CTA Link, name: ctaLink, widget: string }
          - label: Featured Posts
            name: featuredPosts
            widget: list
            hint: "Enter post slugs in the exact order they should appear."
            field: { label: Blog Post Slug, name: slug, widget: string }
          - label: Brand Intro Strip
            name: body
            widget: markdown
            buttons: [bold, italic, link]
            editor_components: [button-link]

      - name: about
        label: About Page
        file: src/content/settings/about.md
        fields:
          - { label: Page Title, name: title, widget: string }
          - label: Body
            name: body
            widget: markdown
            buttons: [bold, italic, heading-two, heading-three, quote, bulleted-list, numbered-list, link]
            editor_components: [button-link]

      - name: contact
        label: Contact Page
        file: src/content/settings/contact.md
        fields:
          - { label: Page Title, name: title, widget: string }
          - label: Body
            name: body
            widget: markdown
            buttons: [bold, italic, heading-two, heading-three, quote, bulleted-list, numbered-list, link]
            editor_components: [button-link]

      - name: site
        label: Global Site Text
        file: src/content/settings/site.md
        fields:
          - { label: Site Title, name: title, widget: string }
          - { label: Site Description, name: description, widget: text }
          - { label: Contact Email, name: contactEmail, widget: string }
          - { label: Pinterest URL, name: pinterestUrl, widget: string, required: false }
          - { label: Affiliate Disclaimer, name: affiliateDisclaimer, widget: text }
          - { label: Footer Text, name: footerText, widget: string }
          - label: Footer Links
            name: footerLinks
            widget: list
            fields:
              - { label: Label, name: label, widget: string }
              - { label: URL, name: href, widget: string }
````

### public/admin/index.html
File does not exist in the current repository.

Note: the admin UI is implemented as `src/pages/admin/index.astro`, not `public/admin/index.html`.

### src/pages/admin/index.astro
````astro
---
---

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex" />
    <link href="/admin/config.yml" type="text/yaml" rel="cms-config-url" />
    <title>Hello Money Clarity Admin</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <script is:inline>
      window.CMS_MANUAL_INIT = true;
      window.initDecap = function() {
        var cms = window.CMS;

        cms.registerEditorComponent({
          id: 'cta-button',
          label: 'CTA Button',
          fields: [
            { name: 'text', label: 'Button Text', widget: 'string' },
            { name: 'href', label: 'URL', widget: 'string' }
          ],
          pattern: /^<CTAButton href="([^"]+)">([\s\S]*?)<\/CTAButton>$/,
          fromBlock: function(match) {
            return { href: match[1], text: match[2] };
          },
          toBlock: function(data) {
            return '<CTAButton href="' + data.href + '">' + data.text + '</CTAButton>';
          },
          toPreview: function(data) {
            return '<a style="display:inline-block;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:8px;background:#D4A93C;color:#123737;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;">' + data.text + '</a>';
          }
        });

        cms.registerEditorComponent({
          id: 'button-link',
          label: 'Button Link',
          fields: [
            { name: 'text', label: 'Button Text', widget: 'string' },
            { name: 'href', label: 'URL', widget: 'string' }
          ],
          pattern: /^<a class="button-link" href="([^"]+)">([\s\S]*?)<\/a>$/,
          fromBlock: function(match) {
            return { href: match[1], text: match[2] };
          },
          toBlock: function(data) {
            return '<a class="button-link" href="' + data.href + '">' + data.text + '</a>';
          },
          toPreview: function(data) {
            return '<a style="display:inline-block;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:8px;background:#D4A93C;color:#123737;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;">' + data.text + '</a>';
          }
        });

        cms.init();
      };
    </script>
    <script is:inline src="https://unpkg.com/decap-cms@3.14.1/dist/decap-cms.js" onload="window.initDecap()"></script>
  </body>
</html>
````

## 7. Global CSS / Design Tokens

There is no `src/styles/global.css`, no `global.css`, and no `tailwind.config.*` file in the current repository. Styling and design tokens are implemented inline in Astro `<style>` blocks. The full contents of all files containing those styles are included above in sections 3 and 4.

Current token values actually implemented include:
- `--color-teal: #0f4c4c`
- `--color-teal-dark: #0a3838`
- `--color-gold: #d4a93c`
- `--color-gold-dark: #bd9028`
- `--color-cream: #fbfaf5`
- `--color-ink: #173232`
- `--color-muted: #5b6f6f`
- `--color-border: #d9e2df`
- `--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif`
- `--content-width: 1120px`
- `--radius: 8px`
- `--shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(15, 76, 76, 0.12)`

## 8. Deviations From Original Spec

- The original reference structure expected `public/admin/index.html`; this implementation uses `src/pages/admin/index.astro` for the admin page and loads the static Decap config from `/admin/config.yml`.
- Admin authentication is configured for DecapBridge/Git Gateway in `public/admin/config.yml`, but live login still needs to be tested after deployment.
- The original spec requested DecapBridge or GitHub OAuth invite-only auth. Local editing currently works through `local_backend` plus the Decap proxy, but production login remains incomplete.
- The color palette request said not to introduce additional brand colors; the implementation uses teal/gold/white plus neutral support colors (`cream`, `ink`, `muted`, `border`) for readability and layout.
- No sitemap is configured, even though the spec requested basic SEO and social sharing support.
- No `robots.txt` is configured.
- No custom 404 page exists.
- Contact page has email and Pinterest link only; no contact form, which matches the no-backend requirement.
- A custom visual/live editor was experimented with earlier but has been removed; only the classic Decap admin method remains.
- The implementation adds custom Decap editor components for CTA/button-like links (`cta-button` and `button-link`), which supports the user-requested button-link appearance.
- The current Cloudflare Pages URL in config does not resolve from this workspace, so a live deploy cannot be confirmed.

## 9. Known Issues, Bugs, Or Incomplete Features

- Production Decap CMS authentication now has DecapBridge/Git Gateway values configured, but the deployed login flow is not yet verified from this workspace.
- `publish_mode: editorial_workflow` is enabled, but Decap local backend documentation notes editorial workflow is not supported locally.
- `hello-money-clarity.pages.dev` did not resolve during the current check, so the live site may not be deployed, may have a different Pages URL, or DNS may not be ready.
- No custom 404 page.
- No sitemap.
- No robots.txt.
- No Cloudflare-specific headers or redirects are configured.
- Git metadata is unusable from this workspace despite a `.git` folder being present.

## 10. Deployment / Build Config

- Intended host: Cloudflare Pages.
- Build command: `npm run build`.
- Output directory: `dist`.
- Astro output mode: `static`.
- Required environment variables: none are defined in repository files.
- Secrets needed for production CMS auth: no secret names are defined in this repository; exact names depend on the chosen OAuth bridge provider.

## 11. Admin Authentication Status

Local admin status: working when the Astro dev server and Decap local proxy are both running. Verified locally at `http://127.0.0.1:4322/admin/#/collections/blog`; it opens `Blog Posts` and `Site Settings` directly without GitHub login.

Production GitHub/DecapBridge auth status: not configured and not tested. The previous fake OAuth bridge (`your-oauth-bridge.example.com`) has been removed from the active config, but no real replacement is configured.

Left to make production auth functional:
- Set up DecapBridge or another Decap-compatible GitHub OAuth bridge.
- Add the real `base_url` and `auth_endpoint` values to `public/admin/config.yml`.
- Confirm the authorized callback/origin settings in the OAuth bridge provider match the deployed Cloudflare Pages URL or custom domain.
- Deploy to Cloudflare Pages and test login from the deployed `/admin/` URL.

- The user requested removal of the newer visual/live editor. It has been removed; only the classic Decap admin remains.
- The admin link currently available locally is `http://127.0.0.1:4322/admin/#/`.
- The user-facing local site URL is `http://127.0.0.1:4322/`.
- `public/admin/config.yml` is served as a static asset at `/admin/config.yml`; the former generated `/config.yml` route has been removed.
